# Circle13

> Circle13 is a premium tech collective and startup studio founded in 2025. We specialize in AI automation, micro-startups, and rapid product innovation.

## About

Circle13 is a movement of innovators pushing the boundaries of what's possible in technology. We operate on the principle that "volume negates luck" — instead of betting on a single idea, we build an engine of chaos and creation, launching multiple ventures simultaneously. If we launch 10 ships, one will reach the stars.

Founded in 2025, Circle13 brings together elite talent to transform ambitious ideas into groundbreaking reality. We are not just a team — we are the signal in the noise.

## What We Do

- **AI Automation**: Optimizing workflows through neural networks and intelligent agents
- **Micro-Startups**: Rapid prototyping engine for market testing new ideas at speed
- **Innovation Summits**: Global community gatherings for knowledge transfer and networking
- **Product Development**: Full-stack development from concept to launch

## Core Team

- **N. Bharath** — Founder & CEO, strategic leadership and vision
- **Akhil Vipin Nair** — CTO & Tech Lead, scalable systems and technical architecture
- **G K Harjith Adithyha** — Team Member
- **Praseeda P Rao** — Team Member

## Our Philosophy

We believe in:
- **Visionary Thinking** — We create trends, not follow them
- **Elite Craftsmanship** — Excellence in every line of code
- **Rapid Execution** — Speed and quality, delivered together
- **Volume Negates Luck** — Launch many, let the market decide

## Technology & Expertise

- Web Development & Modern Frontend (React, Tailwind CSS, Three.js)
- Backend Architecture & Scalable Systems
- AI/ML Integration & Automation
- Cloud & DevOps, CI/CD Pipelines
- UI/UX Design & Product Strategy
- Mobile Application Development
